details.text: Eden finally finds its voice!! Green at mid-on moves back a few steps and takes the catch with a reverse cup. Short of a length at 142kph from Tyagi, who bowls this around seventh stump. Head looks to swat it back down the ground, but loses his bottom hand off the bat. The ball is ballooned up without timing, and Head falls after 46 off 21 balls

Eden finally finds its voice!! Green at mid-on moves back a few steps and takes the catch with a reverse cup. Short of a length at 142kph from Tyagi, who bowls this around seventh stump. Head looks to swat it back down the ground, but loses his bottom hand off the bat. The ball is ballooned up without timing, and Head falls after 46 off 21 balls

great catch by Varun!! He isn't doing it with the ball at the moment, but he does it really well on the field. But wait. Abhishek is hanging around to check for the cleanliness of the catch, as it's referred by the umpire. Varun was at deep square leg, and went low to try and catch the ball, which was dipping on him. The third umpire checks multiple replays from multiple angles, even as it appears that Varun's hands are beneath the ball. But we'll wait for that confirmation. Repeated change of angles finally satisfies the third umpire. He gives it out, and Eden roars. Abhishek walks back frustrated

great catch by Varun!! He isn't doing it with the ball at the moment, but he does it really well on the field. But wait. Abhishek is hanging around to check for the cleanliness of the catch, as it's referred by the umpire. Varun was at deep square leg, and went low to try and catch the ball, which was dipping on him. The third umpire checks multiple replays from multiple angles, even as it appears that Varun's hands are beneath the ball. But we'll wait for that confirmation. Repeated change of angles finally satisfies the third umpire. He gives it out, and Eden roars. Abhishek walks back frustrated

well taken by Rinku at the deep cover-point boundary!! He tip-toes on the fence, but his left leg doesn't touch the boundary. Short of a length from Muzarabani, who got the ball to climb outside off. Kishan looked to slash at it aerially by riding the bounce, and nearly timed it all the way for six

well taken by Rinku at the deep cover-point boundary!! He tip-toes on the fence, but his left leg doesn't touch the boundary. Short of a length from Muzarabani, who got the ball to climb outside off. Kishan looked to slash at it aerially by riding the bounce, and nearly timed it all the way for six

Rinku takes another good catch!! KKR are back into the contest. SRH have to rebuild. Anukul teased Aniket by going on a short of a length, and wide of off. Aniket went slashing away from his body and lofted it wide of long-off, but Rinku, at the long-off boundary, moved swiftly to his left to pouch the ball. It's all going KKR's way suddenly

Rinku takes another good catch!! KKR are back into the contest. SRH have to rebuild. Anukul teased Aniket by going on a short of a length, and wide of off. Aniket went slashing away from his body and lofted it wide of long-off, but Rinku, at the long-off boundary, moved swiftly to his left to pouch the ball. It's all going KKR's way suddenly

header.name: Kolkata Knight Riders v Sunrisers Hyderabad
header.description: 6th Match (N), Indian Premier League at Kolkata, Apr 2 2026

details.text: Eden finally finds its voice!! Green at mid-on moves back a few steps and takes the catch with a reverse cup. Short of a length at 142kph from Tyagi, who bowls this around seventh stump. Head looks to swat it back down the ground, but loses his bottom hand off the bat. The ball is ballooned up without timing, and Head falls after 46 off 21 balls

well taken by Rinku at the deep cover-point boundary!! He tip-toes on the fence, but his left leg doesn't touch the boundary. Short of a length from Muzarabani, who got the ball to climb outside off. Kishan looked to slash at it aerially by riding the bounce, and nearly timed it all the way for six

great catch by Varun!! He isn't doing it with the ball at the moment, but he does it really well on the field. But wait. Abhishek is hanging around to check for the cleanliness of the catch, as it's referred by the umpire. Varun was at deep square leg, and went low to try and catch the ball, which was dipping on him. The third umpire checks multiple replays from multiple angles, even as it appears that Varun's hands are beneath the ball. But we'll wait for that confirmation. Repeated change of angles finally satisfies the third umpire. He gives it out, and Eden roars. Abhishek walks back frustrated

Rinku takes another good catch!! KKR are back into the contest. SRH have to rebuild. Anukul teased Aniket by going on a short of a length, and wide of off. Aniket went slashing away from his body and lofted it wide of long-off, but Rinku, at the long-off boundary, moved swiftly to his left to pouch the ball. It's all going KKR's way suddenly

112040.text: Length ball spins in from outside off, Klaasen clips it through square leg. They easily pick up two

112050.preText: rd: "wide line bowling has never made sense to me, the risk reward never match up." -- Well every dot ball counts. So if you can get it right, it's pretty rewarding
112050.text: Driven away to the sweeper cover fielder

112060.text: Full outside off and spinning in, slowed down to 85.3kph. Reddy looks for a drive on the off side but gets an inside edge onto his pads
112060.shortText: Narine to Nitish Kumar Reddy, no run

113010.text: Back-of-length slower ball outside off, Klaasen has a swipe but is done in by the lack of pace. No contact

113020.text: Looks for a yorker but it ends up a 131kph low full toss. Chipped to long-on on the bounce. Klaasen's top hand came off the bat there in the follow-through

113030.text: Banged in short and wide, pace off again, Reddy waits on it and cuts it out to deep point
113030.shortText: Muzarabani to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 2 runs

113040.preText: Eshwar: "Just saw on AskCricinfo that Rinku has 41 catches for KKR which makes him KKR's leading catcher ahead of Russell (40)" Indeed! Good spot
113040.text: Full outside off, driven out to deep cover
113040.shortText: Muzarabani to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 1 run

113050.text: Wide yorker outside off, Klaasen jams his bat down to squeeze it out towards point

113060.text: Short and wide, flat-batted off the toe end to long-on
113060.postText:
Naren: "What is the target that srh are looking at here?? they went into shell and got just 45 in last 6 overs. Might come back and bite them with Allen and dew" -- Realistically, I think they'll want to get 210 at the least.

VS: "Normal duty resumed. Still Klaasen threat is there in the death overs." -- Yes, and on a strip where run-scoring is really fast in the final four-five overs.

Jack: "Rd - Seems you have not watched 2014 T20 Worldcup final"

And that's time for the timeout.
113060.shortText: Muzarabani to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 1 run

114010.preText: Here's Sunil Narine for his fourth
114010.text: A bit short outside off, fired in at 95kph, Reddy rocks back and pulls it out to deep midwicket
114010.shortText: Narine to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 1 run

114020.preText: Dheeraj: "What do you think of abhishek's catch, abhimanyu, is it fair?" -- I thought so. And I feel in such close cases, fielder should get some benefit of doubt
114020.text: Short and wide, Klaasen pulls it tamely to long-on. Jumps in anger as he takes his run, feeling he missed out on a chance for a big one

114030.text: Not Rahane's day in the field! Full outside off, Reddy hits a cover drive. Rahane, moving to his left, over-runs it and slips as he gets low to stop that and the ball goes through
114030.shortText: Narine to Nitish Kumar Reddy, FOUR

114040.shortText: Narine to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 1 run

114050.text: Now Klaasen gets low on a full delivery around off and spinning across him and sweeps him very fine. Deep backward square was a long way across and can't stop it

114060.text: Fifty partnership up, with a bit of confusion. Klaasen steers this length ball towards point where Tyagi doesn't pick it up cleanly. Had he done so, there may have been a chance at the non-striker's end as Klaasen was slow to start on the run. Eventually the throw is also a bad one and the overthrow gifts SRH another run

115010.text: Short and wide, pace off at 117kph, pulled on the bounce to long-on
115010.shortText: Kartik Tyagi to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 1 run

115020.text: Very good ball. Around yorker length outside off. Klaasen digs it out towards long-on

115030.shortText: Kartik Tyagi to Nitish Kumar Reddy, 1 run

header.title: SRH 171/4  (15.3 ov, Heinrich Klaasen 30*, Nitish Kumar Reddy 22*, Kartik Tyagi 1/28) - Live
